title: Minerdz Quartz
description: Standard overworld Quartz mod, and Groundbreaking end Chloritoid mod.
body:
A couple years ago, on Curseforge... I had downloaded an overworld quartz mod for 1.20, because I wanted one and there weren't many to choose from at that point.
To my utter Horror, it turned out the mod was terrible. The quartz ore block had no collisions and broke with water, not to mention the fact the mining level was bugged so that you could only use iron or higher, despite the waila-esque mods saying otherwise.

In a moment of MCreator-having spite, this mod was born!
The ores spawn like Nether quartz does, in both stone and deepslate.

In addition, there is also a Silicate ore that forms in the End, called chloritoid. it has the same blockset as quartz with slight texture differences. it also slightly glows.

Finally, there is also a quartz and chloritoid Amongus statue that can be either crafted or found rarely in a shrine.
